---
name: Bug report
about: Report an incorrect behavior or regression
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Context

Describe the problem and when it happens.

## Objective

Explain what should be fixed.

## Current Behavior

Describe what currently happens.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen instead.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The bug is reproduced or clearly understood.
- [ ] The incorrect behavior is fixed.
- [ ] No behavior outside the ticket scope is changed.
- [ ] The fix is tested manually or automatically.

## Constraints

- Keep the correction minimal.
- Respect the existing architecture.
- Add or adapt tests if relevant.

## Technical Notes

Mention likely files, modules, endpoints, components, logs, screenshots, or reproduction steps.
